assertions.text: 使用 bronze/silver/gold schema 命名（不使用 ods/dwd/dws）
assertions.evidence: 明确创建了 CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS bronze/silver/gold，未出现 ods/dwd/dws 命名

assertions.text: 包含 CREATE PIPE 使用 COPY INTO FROM '@s3_raw_vol/events/'，FILE_FORMAT TYPE = 'json'
assertions.evidence: 使用了裸 COPY INTO 语句（COPY INTO bronze.events_raw FROM VOLUME s3_raw_vol LOCATION '/events/'），没有 CREATE PIPE，且路径格式为 VOLUME + LOCATION 而非 '@s3_raw_vol/events/'

assertions.text: Silver 层包含 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = '5 minutes'，VCLUSTER，过滤 event_name IS NULL
assertions.evidence: CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE silver.events_cleaned TARGET_LAG = '5 minutes' 存在，过滤 event_name IS NOT NULL 存在，但使用 WAREHOUSE = '<your_warehouse_name>' 而非 VCLUSTER

assertions.text: Silver 层展开 JSON 嵌套字段（properties:page_url 或 $1:page_url 等语法）
assertions.evidence: GET_PATH(PARSE_JSON(properties), 'page_url')::STRING AS page_url — 有效的 JSON 嵌套字段提取语法

assertions.text: Gold 层包含 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
assertions.evidence: CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE gold.event_daily_stats TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM

assertions.text: Gold 层包含 COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) 和 COUNT(*) 或 COUNT(event_id)，按日期和 event_name 分组
assertions.evidence: COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users ... GROUP BY DATE(created_at), event_name
